ac_items.text: GET /api/v1/schedule/config returns entries filtered by user country assignment
PUT /api/v1/schedule/config returns 403 for unassigned country
POST /api/v1/schedule/countries returns 403 for non-GFI and forces auto_buy_enabled=false
Countries with active buy_lock are skipped in bulk PUT (in skipped_countries)
Every schedule write produces audit_trail entry with old/new values

reasoning_text: AC1: GET /config uses user.allowed_countries() to filter - ITRP Manager sees only assigned, GFI sees all (router_v1.py:130-140). AC2: PUT /config checks allowed set and raises AppError 403 FORBIDDEN for unassigned country (router_v1.py:168). AC3: POST /countries checks _has_role(global_finance_it) and forces auto_buy_enabled=False (router_v1.py:267-268, 285). AC4: _is_buy_lock_active() checks lock, adds to skipped_countries list (router_v1.py:185-187). AC5: _write_audit() called in all 5 write e
issues: No PASS/met/verified verdict found in reasoning

ac_items.text: When credit limit breach detected, auto-buy pauses and creates PENDING breach record
POST /api/buying/breach-confirmation with action=confirm includes breached invoice and resumes job
POST /api/buying/breach-confirmation with action=decline excludes invoice and resumes job
Each confirmation/decline action logged in audit trail

reasoning_text: AC1: When credit limit breach detected, auto-buy pauses and creates PENDING breach record — PASS: service.py step_4 sets status=pending (line 737), returns paused_for_confirmation (line 766), _save_paused_job saves to autobuy_paused_jobs (line 1267). AC2: POST breach-confirmation with action=confirm includes invoice and resumes — PASS: router.py confirm_breach updates status=confirmed (line 260), adds to confirmed_invoices (line 288), calls resume_buying_process (line 296). AC3: POST breach-conf

ac_items.text: NotificationService has 6 event handlers matching all notification types from spec
Clean interface: send_email(template, recipients, data) is the core method called by all handlers
Stub mode logs to structlog instead of sending email

reasoning_text: AC1: NotificationService has 6 event handlers — PASS: service.py has methods purchase_complete, purchase_error, backup_restore, credit_limit_breach, autobuy_disabled, pipeline_issue — verified all 6 exist as class methods. AC2: Clean interface send_email(template, recipients, data) is core method — PASS: all 6 handlers delegate to self.send_email() (line 39). AC3: Stub mode logs to structlog — PASS: when config.stub_mode=True, logger.info called with template, subject, recipients, body_preview (

ac_items.text: Successful auto-buy sends 2 emails: Economic summary and Legal summary (via send_purchase_complete)
Failed auto-buy sends 1 consolidated email (via send_purchase_error)
Step 8 failure does not fail overall job (logs warning, continues to Step 9)

reasoning_text: AC1: Successful auto-buy sends 2 emails Economic and Legal via send_purchase_complete — PASS: step_8_send_notifications splits bq_rows by sales_type (line 1277-1278), calls send_purchase_complete for each (lines 1283, 1288). AC2: Failed auto-buy sends 1 consolidated email via send_purchase_error — PASS: else branch calls send_purchase_error once (line 1298). AC3: Step 8 failure does not fail overall job — PASS: entire function wrapped in try/except, returns status=warning on error (line 1306).

ac_items.text: Step 9 releases country lock after auto-buy completes (success or failure)
Lock release in finally block â€” executes even if Steps 5-8 throw
cleanup_expired_locks removes locks where expires_at < now

AC2: Lock release in finally block executes even if Steps 5-8 throw — PASS: scheduler/service.py handle_trigger wraps buying process in try/except/finally at lines 69-100. ac_items.text: Trigger Service checks file_load_status before initiating auto-buy for each country
Country with loaded status within current week proceeds to auto-buy
POST /api/scheduler/file-status allows data pipeline to set load status

reasoning_text: AC1: Trigger Service checks file_load_status before initiating auto-buy — PASS: scheduler/service.py handle_trigger calls check_file_loaded at line 87, skips country with status=skipped_no_file if not loaded (line 91). AC2: Country with loaded status within current week proceeds — PASS: check_file_loaded returns True when status=loaded AND loaded_at >= week_start (Monday 00:00 UTC) at lines 52-68. AC3: POST /api/scheduler/file-status allows data pipeline to set load status — PASS: scheduler/rout
